data.title: 国际服指名手配2倍3 特别依赖2倍3
data.summary: [Double Drop Campaign Preview] From 1/24 (Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty & Commission
data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

From 1/24 (Mon), the amount of rewards dropped in Bounty & Commissions  will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students!

🗓️Period: 1/24 (Mon) 19:00 – 1/31 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
